name: psycheforge
description: PsycheForge — a 15-unit self-transformation studio for mental reprogramming of the user's OWN patterns: beliefs, habits, fears, states, identity narratives. Six registers (cognitive, behavioral, hypnotic, imaginal, somatic, narrative) staged on the alchemical Magnum Opus (Jungian, symbolic — no magic claims). Evidence-labeled techniques, safety gates with STOP authority, measurable protocols with kill criteria, longitudinal ledger. RO/EN.
